sub_modules.conv2d_out_index: Decodes flattened output index into output channel, row, and column.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_mac: Combinational multichannel K by K dot-product over the stored input frame and selected output-channel kernel.
sub_modules.conv2d_bias_add: Selects and adds the per-output-channel bias to the MAC result.
sub_modules.conv2d_clamp: Applies unsigned output clamp from accumulator width to OUT_W.
